blocks.text:
A synthetic fixture covering HTML render paths the curated bank misses: a multiple-choice
answer, an unordered list, and inline `code`.

Consider the forces on a block:

- gravity $mg$ acting downward
- the normal force $N$ from the surface
- friction, here taken as `mu = 0`

Which expression gives its acceleration down a frictionless incline of angle $\theta$?

meta.solution: The component of gravity along the incline is $g\sin\theta$.
meta.subject: physics
meta.title: HTML coverage — choice answer, lists and inline code
